h61426141g15ebg44c3g9742ge78016bae4a1: An actual city, though. Lotta fat arses with full purses in a city.
h199130b9g2562g4436gbf0cg49086fb967fb: Don't know why everyone's cheering. We're just going back on the road.
h777d291dg4cb4g4c70ga49eg55073cb772be: Hope you've picked your last words.
hf4810e53gc83fg4174g9ea3gc5eabd45e247: You can leave your valuables with me if you like.
hdce04c74g20e2g4c5ag9cfbgec7032f47a7c: Goblins strip the dead down to the last stitch, so I hear.
hb4bd9bbfg56e8g4431g9e6fg9935be0dd9b8: No one's going to die today. I promise.
hb9b8c554g7dedg43fdgb72fg570183ab023a: Best pray they don't kill me, then - they'll get you next.
h067cd30cg15dbg4387g9aeega811dbee851f: So you say - survived Avernus, though. More than you've done.
h6b27a00cg9d2ag46c5g8bbage7b05b8541b7: If I fall today, my killer will have earned my hide as a ceremonial display.
h700771b9g92f2g4db5gb4efgb53d5e91a96f: Dunno what that means. But the goblins might think you're on their side - you're ugly enough.
